frontmatter.title: Tree title completion for tool support

mainmatter.p: A new forester complete command has been added to search for trees by their title; the purpose of this command is to facilitate external tool support, such as this proof-of-concept completion engine for neovim. Please browse forester complete --help for more information about this command.
Current limitations: the command is currently case sensitive and only searches prefixes; in the future, it would be desirable to support more flexible fuzzy-search.
Thanks to Riley Shahar for implementing this feature.
